sourceTitle: BLONDME Premium Lightener 9+ Official Product Page and Service Manual
sourceNote: 請以品牌官方技術手冊、產品 leaflet、教育手冊或官方色卡為準。若資料來自經銷商、部落格或非官方影片，verified 必須為 false 或 partial。
notes: Official-source seed for BLONDME Premium Lightener 9+. Kept partial because official mixing ratio is flexible 1:1.5-1:2.5 and current engine cannot yet model technique-specific consistency.

conditions: BLONDME lightening service with compatible Premium Developer.
warnings: 9% / 30 vol is off-scalp only. Additional heat is not recommended. Check development visually every 5 minutes.

restrictions: Confirm compatibility with exact BLONDME product.
Partial rule: official source uses a ratio range, so exact grams are blocked until the engine supports ratio selection.
warnings: Do not force precise formulas for BLONDME until product-specific ratio and technique are selected by a professional.
